title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 26 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 26 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 26 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, the main contract I2401 closed 876.5,an increase of 0.69% throughout the day. Traders ship according to market conditions. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
